{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Samara’s halo
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara’s halo]] is a construction of [[light aura]] created by an expert centuries ago.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara]]'s halo provides a harsh light.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
